_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: the tumors within these PANCOs exhibited a biphasic tissue architecture (densely packed cellular regions interspersed with less compact areas containing cystic components), multiple piloid processes, and some multinucleated cells
details: Recapitulated characteristic PA histopathological features including biphasic tissue architecture, piloid processes, multinucleated cells, rare mitotic figures, and apoptotic bodies
